message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to error tests, SDK signature, and benchmark imports

Purely mechanical rustfmt changes with zero semantic impact:

- src/error.rs: Reformats 4 multi-argument function calls in test
  assertions (is_context_overflow, is_retryable_error) to use one
  argument per line, matching the project's line-width preference.
  Also collapses one over-expanded call that already fit on one line.

- src/sdk.rs: Collapses the set_thinking_level() method signature from
  4 lines to 1 line since it fits within the line width limit after
  the parameter list simplification.

- benches/tools.rs: Collapses the multi-line `use pi::model::{...}`
  import in bench_streaming_arc() to a single line since all 5 items
  fit within the line width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
